title: Marketplace Manager - Zepto - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zepto - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zepto family as a Marketplace Manager in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zepto:
Zepto is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zepto!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
